creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
All accounts referenced in #comment 0 have had the following changes made:

    The "login disabled" text has been modified.
    Logging in with this user account has been disabled.
    Bugmail has been disabled.

With the Disable Text comment as follows:

Disabled 20220503 (koobs) -- Deprecated mailing list. See: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=263175
